# Support

## Getting help

Questions and requests are handled through GitHub Issues. Creating an issue presents a form.

- Bug reports: Bug report form
- Feature suggestions: Feature request form

Usage questions should also go through Issues first.

## Security issues

Do not report security vulnerabilities here. Please report them privately through the GitHub Security Advisory channel described in [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).

## Documentation first (docs-first)

Please check the documentation before asking. The entry point is [docs/index.en.md](../docs/index.en.md).

## Response expectations

This is a single-maintainer repository, so responses are best-effort and no response time is guaranteed.

Security reports, however, do not follow the general response expectations above — they follow the Response SLA (a separate standard) defined in [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
